title: glinus lotoides var. setiflorus
intro: Glinus lotoides var. setiflorus, also known as Setiflorous Glinus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Molluginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. Glinus lotoides var. setiflorus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
